case_name: London Ultra Low Emission Zone 2023 expansion
verification_policy: Only facts with reliable source URL and source quote are marked 已确认. Missing or incomplete items are marked 待核实 or 未找到.

facts.requested_item: ULEZ 2023 扩区的确切生效日期；扩区范围
facts.fact: ULEZ 于 2023-08-29 扩展至所有 London boroughs；TfL 页面另说明该区域覆盖 all London boroughs and the City of London。

value.scope: all London boroughs and the City of London

sources.source_name: Transport for London - ULEZ Expansion 2023
sources.quote: expanded across all London boroughs on 29 August 2023

sources.source_name: Transport for London - ULEZ Expansion 2023
sources.quote: all London boroughs and the City of London

facts.notes: TfL 当前页面还说明 ULEZ operates across all London boroughs and does not include the M25，但本条采用扩区页作为主证据。

facts.requested_item: 非合规车辆的每日收费金额
facts.fact: 非合规且未豁免车辆在 ULEZ 内行驶需支付每日 £12.50。

sources.source_name: Transport for London - Ultra Low Emission Zone

facts.notes: 适用于 cars, motorcycles, vans and specialist vehicles up to 3.5 tonnes, and minibuses up to 5 tonnes；大型车辆适用 LEZ 规则。

facts.requested_item: 排放标准 petrol / diesel 分别是什么 Euro 标准
facts.fact: House of Commons Library briefing 将 ULEZ/CAZ 合规标准概括为 petrol cars/vans Euro 4，diesel cars/vans Euro 6。

sources.source_name: House of Commons Library - Clean Air Zones, Low Emission Zones and the London ULEZ
sources.quote: Euro 4 for petrol cars and vans

sources.source_name: House of Commons Library - Clean Air Zones, Low Emission Zones and the London ULEZ
sources.quote: Euro 6 for diesel cars and vans

facts.notes: 同页说明 Euro VI applies to buses, coaches and HGVs.

facts.requested_item: 2023 Uxbridge and South Ruislip 补选的确切结果
facts.fact: 2023-07-20 Uxbridge and South Ruislip by-election 为 Conservative hold；Steve Tuckwell 13,965 票、45.2%；Danny Beales 13,470 票、43.6%；多数票 495；投票率 46.1%。

sources.source_name: UK Parliament - Uxbridge and South Ruislip election result
UK Parliament - Uxbridge and South Ruislip election result

facts.notes: 同页 breakdown 表列出 Steve Tuckwell / Conservative / 13,965 / 45.2% 与 Danny Boy Beales / Labour / 13,470 / 43.6%。

facts.requested_item: ULEZ 是否被公认为该补选的关键议题
facts.fact: 可靠分析/报道将 ULEZ 扩区与 Uxbridge 补选结果直接关联：Institute for Government 认为 ULEZ plans 是 Labour narrow loss 的 key factor；YouGov 文章称 ULEZ 被 held responsible for Labour’s failure to win the seat。

sources.source_name: Institute for Government - Will the Uxbridge by-election prove a crossroads for net zero?
sources.quote: key factor in Labour's narrow loss

sources.source_name: YouGov - Londoners split on ULEZ expansion

facts.notes: 这是政治解释/分析事实，不是官方选举委员会的因果认定。用于回测时应标为 political salience signal，而非确定因果。

facts.requested_item: 公众对 ULEZ 扩区的意见分布
facts.fact: YouGov/ITV 2023-08-09 至 2023-08-14 调查显示：Londoners 47% 支持扩区、42% 反对；inner London 支持 62% vs 反对 26%；outer London 反对 51% vs 支持 38%。

sources.source_name: YouGov - Londoners split on ULEZ expansion
YouGov - Londoners split on ULEZ expansion

facts.notes: YouGov 页面说明调查为 for ITV, conducted on 9-14 August。

facts.requested_item: 是否发生了摄像头破坏/执法抵制（Blade Runners 等）
facts.fact: Metropolitan Police FOI 显示 2023-08-01 至 2023-10-15 期间记录 416 起 ULEZ-related offences：59 theft、357 arson and criminal damage；property status 中 74 stolen、358 damaged。Sky/ITV 报道说明部分破坏者自称 Blade Runners。

sources.source_name: Metropolitan Police FOI - Crimes relating to ULEZ cameras from August to October 2023
Metropolitan Police FOI downloadable XLSX
Sky News - anti-ULEZ suspect / blade runners

facts.notes: FOI attachment caveat: property may be marked both stolen and damaged; property count and offence count should not be summed.

facts.requested_item: 摄像头破坏/执法抵制的公众态度
facts.fact: YouGov/ITV 调查显示，Londoners 整体反对摄像头破坏行为 51% vs 支持 32%；但在 ULEZ 扩区反对者中，支持破坏行为 51% vs 反对 36%。

sources.source_name: YouGov - Londoners split on ULEZ expansion
YouGov - Londoners split on ULEZ expansion

facts.notes: 该项可用于回测模型是否捕捉到 opposition subgroup radicalisation，而不是整体公众态度。

facts.category: D. 政策实际效果（6 个月后）
facts.fact: London-wide ULEZ 6 个月报告显示，subject vehicles 的 London-wide compliance rate 从 2023-06 的 91.6% 上升到 6 个月后的 96.2%。Cars 为 97.1%，vans 为 88.9%。

sources.source_name: London City Hall - London-wide ULEZ Six Month Report
sources.quote: 96.2 per cent, up from 91.6 per cent

sources.source_name: London City Hall - London-wide ULEZ Six Month Report
sources.quote: 97.1 per cent of cars and 88.9 per cent of vans

facts.notes: Report defines compliance rate as the share of detected vehicles in the zone that meet ULEZ standards.

facts.category: D. 政策实际效果（6 个月后）
facts.fact: 2024-02 与 2023-06 相比，London-wide ULEZ 平均每日检测到的 non-compliant vehicles 减少 90,000，降幅 53%。

sources.source_name: London City Hall - London-wide ULEZ Six Month Report
London City Hall - London-wide ULEZ Six Month Report

facts.notes: 同页表述为 average day, February 2024 compared to June 2023.

facts.category: D. 政策实际效果（6 个月后）
facts.requested_item: 空气质量 / NO2 排放变化
facts.fact: 6 个月报告给出 NOx emissions 和 NO2 concentrations 两类结果：outer London cars/vans NOx emissions 相对 no-ULEZ scenario 分别低 13% 和 7%；outer London roadside NO2 concentrations 在首 6 个月 up to 4.4% lower。

sources.source_name: London City Hall - London-wide ULEZ Six Month Report
sources.quote: 13 per cent and 7 per cent lower

sources.source_name: London City Hall - London-wide ULEZ Six Month Report
London City Hall - London-wide ULEZ Six Month Report
sources.quote: 21 per cent lower in outer London

facts.notes: 官方页面使用 NOx emissions 和 roadside NO2 concentrations；不要把 NOx emissions 改写成 NO2 emissions。

facts.category: D. 政策实际效果（6 个月后）
facts.requested_item: NO2 排放变化（精确为 NO2 emissions）
facts.fact: 未在 London-wide ULEZ Six Month Report 页面中找到“NO2 emissions”这个精确指标；已找到的是 NOx emissions 与 NO2 roadside concentrations。

sources.source_name: London City Hall - London-wide ULEZ Six Month Report
London City Hall - London-wide ULEZ Six Month Report

facts.notes: 如项目必须使用 NO2 emissions，需要人工查阅 full report PDF 或 supplementary data sheet；当前网页级证据不足。
